subcodes.first_line: O Rahim! The All-Bountiful, Who lieth imprisoned in the prison of 'Akká, maketh mention of thee, having summoned all unto God, the Lord of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رحیم یذکرک الکریم الذی سجن فی سجن عکاء بما دعا الکل الی الله مالک الاسماء
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
